SELECT pt.id, pt.name->>'en_US' AS product, 
       COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.state = 'done' AND sm.location_dest_id IN (SELECT id FROM stock_location WHERE usage = 'customer') THEN sm.product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS units_sold_ytd,
       COALESCE(AVG(sq.quantity), 0) AS avg_on_hand,
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(AVG(sq.quantity), 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.state = 'done' AND sm.location_dest_id IN (SELECT id FROM stock_location WHERE usage = 'customer') THEN sm.product_qty ELSE 0 END), 0) / COALESCE(AVG(sq.quantity), 0) ELSE 0 END AS stock_turn_ratio
FROM product_template pt
LEFT JOIN product_product pp ON pp.product_tmpl_id = pt.id
LEFT JOIN stock_move sm ON sm.product_id = pp.id AND sm.date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND sm.date < DATE '2026-06-12'
LEFT JOIN stock_quant sq ON sq.product_id = pp.id
GROUP BY pt.id, pt.name
ORDER BY pt.id;

WITH ytd_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    product_tmpl_id,
    SUM(new_quantity) as units_sold_ytd
  FROM stock_change_product_qty
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND new_quantity < 0
  GROUP BY product_tmpl_id
),
avg_on_hand AS (
  SELECT 
    product_tmpl_id,
    AVG(new_quantity) as avg_quantity_on_hand
  FROM stock_change_product_qty
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM create_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  GROUP BY product_tmpl_id
)
SELECT 
  pt.id,
  pt.default_code,
  pt.name,
  COALESCE(ABS(ys.units_sold_ytd), 0) as units_sold_ytd,
  COALESCE(ah.avg_quantity_on_hand, 0) as avg_on_hand,
  CASE 
    WHEN COALESCE(ah.avg_quantity_on_hand, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(ABS(COALESCE(ys.units_sold_ytd, 0)) / COALESCE(ah.avg_quantity_on_hand, 0), 2)
  END as stock_turn_ratio
FROM product_template pt
LEFT JOIN ytd_sales ys ON pt.id = ys.product_tmpl_id
LEFT JOIN avg_on_hand ah ON pt.id = ah.product_tmpl_id
ORDER BY stock_turn_ratio DESC NULLS LAST;

nl: Identify products with high revenue but low inventory turn.

trials.pred_sql:
WITH product_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    sm.product_id,
    SUM(CASE 
      WHEN sm.location_dest_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 
      ELSE 0 
    END) as move_count
  FROM stock_move sm
  WHERE sm.state = 'done'
  GROUP BY sm.product_id
),
product_inventory AS (
  SELECT 
    sq.product_id,
    SUM(sq.quantity) as total_quantity
  FROM stock_quant sq
  GROUP BY sq.product_id
),
product_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    pr.product_id,
    pr.move_count,
    COALESCE(pi.total_quantity, 0) as inventory_level,
    CASE 
      WHEN COALESCE(pi.total_quantity, 0) > 0 
      THEN pr.move_count::numeric / COALESCE(pi.total_quantity, 1)
      ELSE 0 
    END as inventory_turnover
  FROM product_revenue pr
  LEFT JOIN product_inventory pi ON pr.product_id = pi.product_id
)
SELECT 
  product_id,
  move_count,
  inventory_level,
  inventory_turnover
FROM product_metrics
WHERE move_count > (SELECT AVG(move_count) FROM product_revenue)
  AND inventory_turnover < (SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN inventory_level > 0 THEN move_count::numeric / inventory_level ELSE 0 END) FROM product_metrics)
ORDER BY move_count DESC, inventory_turnover ASC;

WITH payment_quarters AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ap.create_date)::integer AS year,
    EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM ap.create_date)::integer AS quarter,
    SUM(ap.amount) AS total_amount,
    COUNT(*) AS payment_count
  FROM account_payment ap
  WHERE ap.create_date IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ap.create_date), EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM ap.create_date)
)
SELECT 
  pq1.year,
  pq1.quarter,
  pq1.total_amount AS current_year_amount,
  pq1.payment_count AS current_year_count,
  pq2.total_amount AS last_year_amount,
  pq2.payment_count AS last_year_count,
  ROUND(((pq1.total_amount - pq2.total_amount) / pq2.total_amount * 100)::numeric, 2) AS percent_change
FROM payment_quarters pq1
LEFT JOIN payment_quarters pq2 
  ON pq1.quarter = pq2.quarter 
  AND pq1.year = pq2.year + 1
WHERE pq2.total_amount IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pq1.year DESC, pq1.quarter DESC;

  GROUP BY po.partner_id, rp.name
),
spend_percentiles AS (
  SELECT
    partner_id,
    supplier_name,
    order_count,
    total_spend,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_spend) AS spend_percentile,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY order_count) AS order_percentile
  FROM supplier_metrics
)
SELECT
  partner_id,
  supplier_name,
  order_count,
  total_spend,
  ROUND((spend_percentile * 100)::numeric, 2) AS spend_percentile_rank,
  ROUND((order_percentile * 100)::numeric, 2) AS order_percentile_rank,
  CASE
    WHEN spend_percentile >= 0.75 AND order_percentile <= 0.25 THEN 'HIGH RISK'
    WHEN spend_percentile >= 0.5 AND order_percentile <= 0.5 THEN 'MEDIUM RISK'

ORDER BY total_spend DESC, order_count ASC;

last_year AS (

)

FROM current_year cy
